metadata.description: Specmint TDD marketplace containing the specmint-tdd plugin for TDD-first, persistent, resumable AI coding specs.

plugins.name: specmint-tdd
plugins.description: TDD-first spec management for AI coding workflows. Every task starts with a failing test, no production code without red tests. Specs enforce true red-green-red-green cycles (TEST-IMPL task pairs within feature phases), testcontainers for real services, tests-are-sacred rule, and strict gate checkpoints.
